title: Binary Search, Selection, and Boundary Finding · Scale Transfer
summary: Locate inventory thresholds and percentiles without off-by-one failures. The scenario, data, constraints, and failure modes differ from the workshop. Planned artifact: Produce an independent changed-context version of a boundary-safe search and selection toolkit with automated and judgment evidence. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Maintain a precise candidate interval and prove each binary-search update shrinks it.
Find first true, last false, lower bound, and upper bound under duplicate values.
Binary-search an answer space only after proving a monotone feasibility predicate.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
